title: calamintha pamphylica subsp. davisii
intro: Calamintha pamphylica subsp. davisii, also known as Davis's calamintha, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Davis's calamintha include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve mood. The plant can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in herbal remedies and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
